div.p: pl_master conducts fan-out with DQ gates between every layer
pl_bronze — Parallel bronze loads batch_count=8 · retry 2×30s
pl_silver — DAG-ordered loads batch_count=2-4 by parallel_group
pl_gold — Parallel gold loads batch_count=8 · timeout=3h
Stored Procedures (the atoms) Each SP loads one table per pattern
5. If Condition Halt if CRITICAL failed
10. Finalize UPDATE pipeline_run_log Teams webhook POST
Lookup SELECT FROM meta.sp_registry WHERE layer='bronze' AND is_active=1
Lookup + topo sort SELECT ... ORDER BY parallel_group
Group 1: ref_data slv_customer_scd2 slv_product_scd2 (parallel, no deps)
CREATE PROCEDURE bronze.usp_load_brz_invoice BEGIN TRY ...MERGE logic... EXEC dbo.usp_log_run @status='success' END TRY BEGIN CATCH EXEC dbo.usp_log_run @status='failed' THROW END CATCH
